mapper.select: SELECT * FROM board ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board (title, content, user_id) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{userId})
mapper.update: UPDATE board set title = #{title}, content = #{content} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board set view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE board SET like_count = like_count - 1 WHERE id = #{boardId} AND like_count > 0
